# Richo

> Richo is the AI freelance marketplace — connect with vetted Prompt Engineers, Vibe Coders, AI Automation Experts, and AI Video Editors, or showcase your AI skills and get hired.

Richo helps clients post AI projects and hire specialised AI talent, and helps freelancers discover paid AI work across automation, prompt engineering, web/vibe coding, and AI video editing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Richo AI freelance marketplace.
- [Browse Tasks](/browse-tasks): Open AI projects and tasks for freelancers to apply to.
- [Find AI Experts](/find-experts): Directory of vetted AI freelancers and specialists.
- [Post a Task](/post-task): Clients can post a new AI project for hire.
- [Sign In / Sign Up](/auth): Create an account or log in as a client or expert.

## Optional

- [Client Sign In](/auth/client)
- [Expert Sign In](/auth/expert)
